## New Game / Update

**Game:** <!-- Your game name -->
**App ID:** <!-- Steam app ID -->
**Store page:** <!-- https://store.steampowered.com/app/XXXXX/ -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `games/<app-id>/manifest.json` is valid JSON
- [ ] Verification token is live on the Steam store page
- [ ] `index.json` has been updated
- [ ] Total folder size is under 5 MB
- [ ] No JavaScript files included
- [ ] Effects tested locally with the extension loaded unpacked
